name: Repeat as % of Overall Bookings (monthwise) [with_extensions]
description: Repeat as % of Overall Bookings (monthwise) | repeat guest loyalty returning
sql:
WITH query_1 AS (
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as booking_Date, array_agg(opportunity_slug), count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(activities.resolved_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.opportunity_slug
                      ORDER BY activities.resolved_at) AS ranking,
          opportunity_slug,
          activities.rating AS rating
   FROM activities
   INNER JOIN opportunities ON activities.opportunity_slug=opportunities.slug
   WHERE opportunities.type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
     AND (activities.rating = 'maal_laao' or activities.rating = 'partial_payment')
     and date(enquired_at) > date(now() - interval '300 days')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist order by resolved_at_date_ist desc
),
query_555 AS (
SELECT date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist) as month,count(rating) as bookings
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND (date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist)=date_part('month',now()) 
or date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist)=date_part('month',now())-1 
or date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist)=date_part('month',now())-2)
and date_part('year',resolved_at_date_ist)=2022
group by month
),
query_2 AS (
SELECT NULL
),
query_551 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now())
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now())
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_556 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now() + interval '330 minutes')-1
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes')=date_part('year',now() + interval '330 minutes')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_557 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now() + interval '330 minutes')-2
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes')=date_part('year',now() + interval '330 minutes')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_558 AS (
select (cast(12 as bigint)) as month,* from query_551
union 
select (cast(11 as bigint)) as month,* from query_556 
union
select (cast(10 as bigint)) as month,* from query_557
)
select case when query_1.month=1 then 'January'
        when query_1.month=2 then 'February'
        when query_1.month=3 then 'March'
        when query_1.month=4 then 'April'
        when query_1.month=5 then 'May'
        when query_1.month=6 then 'June'
        when query_1.month=7 then 'July'
        when query_1.month=8 then 'August'
        when query_1.month=9 then 'September'
        when query_1.month=10 then 'October' 
        when query_1.month=11 then 'November'
        when query_1.month=12 then 'December'
        end as month, query_1.percentage
from
(
select sub_query.month,(sub_query.repeat_guest*100/sub_query.bookings) as percentage
from
(
select a.month,a.bookings,b.repeat_guest from query_555 as a
join query_558 as b on a.month=b.month
)sub_query
)query_1
order by query_1.month asc

),
query_491 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.secondary_to_primary) as bigint) as secondary_to_primary
from
(
select case when query_1.created_at < query_2.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as secondary_to_primary
from
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_1
inner join 
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.created_at,query_2.resolved_at
)query_3
),
query_490 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.primary_to_secondary) as bigint) as primary_to_secondary
from(
select case when query_2.created_at > query_1.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as primary_to_secondary
from
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as query_1
inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.resolved_at,query_2.created_at
)query_3
),
query_498 AS (
select count(sub_query.count) as repeat_guest
from
(
select mobiles.mobile,count(mobiles.mobile) as count
from rental_opportunities inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
and mobiles.mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobiles.mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobiles.mobile) > 1
ORDER BY mobiles.mobile
)sub_query
)
select (a.repeat_guest+b.secondary_to_primary+c.primary_to_secondary+d.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest
from query_504 as a
join query_491 as b
join query_490 as c
join query_498 as d

name: Average LTV with AOV [without_extensions]
description: Average LTV with AOV | lifetime value average order value
sql:
WITH query_492 AS (
select avg(sub_query.gmv) as ltv
from(
SELECT x.mobile,count(x.mobile),sum((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as gmv,x.check_in,x.check_out
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating, rental_opportunities.check_in,rental_opportunities.check_out,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
    
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and x.mobile != '' 
GROUP BY x.mobile,x.check_in,x.check_out
HAVING   COUNT(x.mobile) > 1
ORDER BY x.mobile
)sub_query
),
query_535 AS (
select cast(sum(sub_query.gmv) as bigint) as gmv
from
(SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as edate,sum((breakdown ->> 'net_base_rate')::float * (breakdown ->>'currency_factor')::float) as gmv
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating,
          breakdown
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   INNER join rental_reservations on rental_reservations.rental_opportunity_id = rental_opportunities.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (rental_reservations.status in ('booked','force_booked','hold'))
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
group by resolved_at_date_ist
) sub_query
),
query_536 AS (
select cast(sum(sub_query.count) as bigint) as bookings
from
(
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as eDate,count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and (date_part('year',performed_at)=2021 or date_part('year',performed_at)=2020)
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
group by resolved_at_date_ist
)sub_query
),
query_537 AS (
select (query.gmv/query.bookings) as aov from
(
select * from query_535 as a
join query_536 as b
) query
)
select * from query_492 as a
join query_537 as b

  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id

   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id

   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'

 ) x

name: Repeat Guest MTD [without_extensions]
description: Repeat Guest MTD | month to date | repeat guest loyalty returning
sql:
WITH query_2 AS (
SELECT NULL
),
query_1 AS (
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as booking_Date, array_agg(opportunity_slug), count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(activities.resolved_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.opportunity_slug
                      ORDER BY activities.resolved_at) AS ranking,
          opportunity_slug,
          activities.rating AS rating
   FROM activities
   INNER JOIN opportunities ON activities.opportunity_slug=opportunities.slug
   WHERE opportunities.type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
     AND (activities.rating = 'maal_laao' or activities.rating = 'partial_payment')
     and date(enquired_at) > date(now() - interval '300 days')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist order by resolved_at_date_ist desc
),
query_547 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now())
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now())
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
where (query_1.diff>=5 or query_1.diff is null)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_3 AS (
SELECT DATE(enquired_at), COUNT(enquired_at)
FROM rental_opportunities
WHERE DATE(enquired_at) >= DATE(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '7 days')
GROUP BY DATE(enquired_at)
order by date(enquired_at) asc
),
query_548 AS (
select case when sum(query_3.primary_to_secondary)is not null then cast(sum(query_3.primary_to_secondary) as bigint) else 0 end as primary_to_secondary
from(
select case when query_2.created_at > query_1.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as primary_to_secondary
from
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as query_1
inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',opportunity_contacts.created_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now())
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now())
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.resolved_at,query_2.created_at
)query_3
),
query_549 AS (
select case when sum(query_3.secondary_to_primary)>0 then cast(sum(query_3.secondary_to_primary) as bigint)
else 0 end as secondary_to_primary
from
(
select case when query_1.created_at < query_2.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as secondary_to_primary
from
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_1
inner join 
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now())
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now())
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.created_at,query_2.resolved_at
)query_3
)
select (a.repeat_guest+c.secondary_to_primary+b.primary_to_secondary) as repeat_guest
from query_547 as a
join query_548 as b
join query_549 as c

),
query_504 AS (

(

(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in

FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'

 ) x

) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,

)query_1
where (query_1.diff!=0  or query_1.diff is not null)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_3 AS (
SELECT DATE(enquired_at), COUNT(enquired_at)
FROM rental_opportunities
WHERE DATE(enquired_at) >= DATE(now() + interval '5 hours 30 minutes' - interval '7 days')
GROUP BY DATE(enquired_at)
order by date(enquired_at) asc
),
query_491 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.secondary_to_primary) as bigint) as secondary_to_primary
from
(
select case when query_1.created_at < query_2.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as secondary_to_primary
from
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_1
inner join 
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)as query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.created_at,query_2.resolved_at
)query_3
),
query_490 AS (
select cast(sum(query_3.primary_to_secondary) as bigint) as primary_to_secondary
from(
select case when query_2.created_at > query_1.resolved_at then count(query_1.mobile) else 0 end as primary_to_secondary
from
(SELECT mobile,resolved_at
FROM
  (SELECT tasks.performed_at as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as query_1
inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile as mobile,created_at
FROM
  (SELECT opportunity_contacts.created_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
)query_2 on query_1.mobile=query_2.mobile
group by query_1.resolved_at,query_2.created_at
)query_3
),
query_498 AS (
select count(sub_query.count) as repeat_guest
from
(
select mobiles.mobile,count(mobiles.mobile) as count
from rental_opportunities inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
where opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
and mobiles.mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobiles.mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobiles.mobile) > 1
ORDER BY mobiles.mobile
)sub_query
),
query_505 AS (
select (a.repeat_guest+b.secondary_to_primary+c.primary_to_secondary+d.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest
from query_504 as a
join query_491 as b
join query_490 as c
join query_498 as d
),
query_530 AS (
SELECT count(distinct(x.mobile)) as count1
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is true)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
),
query_531 AS (
SELECT count(distinct(x.mobile)) as count2
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, mobiles.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   inner join opportunity_contacts on rental_opportunities.id=opportunity_contacts.opportunity_id
   inner join contacts on opportunity_contacts.contact_id=contacts.id
   inner join mobiles on mobiles.contactable_id=contacts.id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and opportunity_type = 'Rental::Opportunity' and (opportunity_contacts.is_primary is null or opportunity_contacts.is_primary is false)
   and mobiles.contactable_type='Contact'
   and rental_opportunities.source!='wildberrystays.com'
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
),
query_532 AS (
select (sub_query.count1 + sub_query.count2) as all_users
from
(
select *  from query_530 as a
join query_531 as b
) sub_query
)
select cast((sub_query.repeat_guest*100.00/sub_query.all_users) as float) as percentage
from
(
select * from query_505 as a
join query_532 as b
)sub_query

name: Average Number of Days between Two Trips [without_extensions]
description: Average Number of Days between Two Trips
sql:
select cast(avg(query1.diff) as bigint)as average_number_of_days
FROM
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query1
where (query1.diff !=0)

name: Repeat Guest Duration Distribution [without_extensions]
description: Repeat Guest Duration Distribution | repeat guest loyalty returning
sql:
WITH query_487 AS (
select query1.diff as days
FROM
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query1

),
query_488 AS (
select 'Within 1 Month' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 0 and days <=30  THEN 1
             END) as count,count(days) as total
from query_487
union
select 'Within 2 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 30 and days <=60  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_487       
union
select 'Within 3 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 60 and days <=90  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_487 
union
select 'Within 4 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 90 and days <=120  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_487
union
select 'More than 4 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 120  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_487
)
select month,(count*100/total) as distribution from query_488
ORDER BY CASE WHEN month = 'Within 1 Month' THEN '1'
              WHEN month = 'Within 2 Months' THEN '2'
              WHEN month = 'Within 3 Months' THEN '3'
              WHEN month = 'Within 4 Months' THEN '4'
              ELSE month END

name: Average Transaction Repeat Time (#Days between last Checkout to next Booking) [without_extensions]
description: Average Transaction Repeat Time (#Days between last Checkout to next Booking) | repeat guest loyalty returning
sql:
select cast(avg(query1.diff) as bigint)as average_number_of_days
FROM
(
SELECT 
 distinct(sub_query.*), sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS difference, 
 sub_query.performed_at - LAG(sub_query.check_out) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_out) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_out,b.performed_at,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_out,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_out, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT x.performed_at,mobile
FROM
  (SELECT date(tasks.performed_at) as performed_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile,x.performed_at
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query1

name: Transaction Repeat Duration Distribution [without_extensions]
description: Transaction Repeat Duration Distribution | repeat guest loyalty returning
sql:
WITH query_545 AS (
select abs(diff) as days
FROM
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS difference, 
 sub_query.performed_at - LAG(sub_query.check_out) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_out) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_out,b.performed_at,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_out,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_out, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT x.performed_at,mobile
FROM
  (SELECT date(tasks.performed_at) as performed_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile,x.performed_at
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query1
where (query1.difference =0)
)
select a.month,cast(round((a.count*100/total),2) as bigint) as distribution from
(select 'Within 3 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 0 and days <=90  THEN 1
             END) as count,count(days) as total
from query_545
union
select 'In 3-6 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 90 and days <=180 THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_545      
union
select 'In 6-9 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 180 and days <=270  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_545
union
select 'In 9-12 Months' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 275 and days <=360  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_545
union
select 'More than a year' as month,count(CASE
                 WHEN days > 360  THEN 1
             END) AS count,count(days) as total
from query_545
) as a
ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.month = 'Within 3 Months' THEN '1'
              WHEN a.month = 'In 3-6 Months' THEN '2'
              WHEN a.month = 'In 6-9 Months' THEN '3'
              WHEN a.month = 'In 9-12 Months' THEN '4'
              ELSE a.month END

name: Repeat as % of Overall Bookings (monthwise) [without_extensions]
description: Repeat as % of Overall Bookings (monthwise) | repeat guest loyalty returning
sql:
WITH query_1 AS (
SELECT resolved_at_date_ist as booking_Date, array_agg(opportunity_slug), count(rating) as count
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(activities.resolved_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.opportunity_slug
                      ORDER BY activities.resolved_at) AS ranking,
          opportunity_slug,
          activities.rating AS rating
   FROM activities
   INNER JOIN opportunities ON activities.opportunity_slug=opportunities.slug
   WHERE opportunities.type = 'Rental::Opportunity'
     AND (activities.rating = 'maal_laao' or activities.rating = 'partial_payment')
     and date(enquired_at) > date(now() - interval '300 days')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND resolved_at_date_ist::timestamp >= date(now() - interval '7 days')
group by resolved_at_date_ist order by resolved_at_date_ist desc
),
query_555 AS (
SELECT date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist) as month,count(rating) as bookings
FROM
  (SELECT DATE(tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at_date_ist,
          rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
AND (date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist)=date_part('month',now()) 
or date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist)=date_part('month',now())-1 
or date_part('month',resolved_at_date_ist)=date_part('month',now())-2)
and date_part('year',resolved_at_date_ist)=2022
group by month
),
query_2 AS (
SELECT NULL
),
query_547 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now())
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now())
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
where (query_1.diff>=5 or query_1.diff is null)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_560 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now() + interval '330 minutes')-1
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now() + interval '330 minutes')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
where (query_1.diff>=10)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_561 AS (
select count(query_2.repeat_guest) as repeat_guest from
(
select count(query_1.mobile) as repeat_guest from
(
SELECT 
 sub_query.*, 
 sub_query.check_in - LAG(sub_query.check_in) OVER (PARTITION BY sub_query.mobile ORDER BY sub_query.check_in) AS diff 
FROM
(
select b.mobile,a.check_in
from
(SELECT mobile,x.check_in
FROM
  (SELECT rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile, rental_opportunities.check_in,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
) as a
Inner JOIN
(SELECT mobile,count(mobile) as count
FROM
  (SELECT (tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') as resolved_at,rank() over(PARTITION BY activities.leadable_id
                      ORDER BY tasks.performed_at) AS ranking, rental_opportunities.mobile as mobile,
          tasks.rating AS rating
   FROM tasks
   inner join activities on tasks.id= activities.feedable_id
   INNER JOIN rental_opportunities ON rental_opportunities.id=activities.leadable_id
   where activities.feedable_type='Task' and activities.leadable_type='Rental::Opportunity'
   AND (tasks.rating = 'maal_laao' or tasks.rating='partial_payment')
   and date_part('month',tasks.performed_at + interval '5 hours 30 minutes') = date_part('month',now() + interval '330 minutes')-2
   and date_part('year',tasks.performed_at)=date_part('year',now() + interval '330 minutes')
 ) x
WHERE ranking = 1
and mobile != ''
GROUP BY mobile
HAVING   COUNT(mobile) > 1
ORDER BY count desc
) as b on a.mobile=b.mobile
)sub_query
)query_1
where (query_1.diff>=10)
group by query_1.mobile
)query_2
),
query_562 AS (
select (cast(12 as bigint)) as month,* from query_547
union 
select (cast(11 as bigint)) as month,* from query_560
union
select (cast(10 as bigint)) as month,* from query_561
)
select case when query_1.month=1 then 'January'
        when query_1.month=2 then 'February'
        when query_1.month=3 then 'March'
        when query_1.month=4 then 'April'
        when query_1.month=5 then 'May'
        when query_1.month=6 then 'June'
        when query_1.month=7 then 'July'
        when query_1.month=8 then 'August'
        when query_1.month=9 then 'September'
        when query_1.month=10 then 'October' 
        when query_1.month=11 then 'November'
        when query_1.month=12 then 'December'
        end as month, query_1.percentage
from
(
select sub_query.month,(sub_query.repeat_guest*100/sub_query.bookings) as percentage
from
(
select a.month,a.bookings,b.repeat_guest from query_555 as a
join query_562 as b on a.month=b.month
)sub_query
)query_1
order by query_1.month asc
